sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46190" key="zeuci/gamos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζευξίγᾰμος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n46190.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she that yokes in marriage</tr_>, epith. of the planet Venus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.173</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
